creator: handy@lambic.physics.montana.edu
text:
I think I've worked out two things:

	(1) The md5 checksum changed along the way somewhere. 
	    Fixed that.
	(2) RUN_DEPENDS=libtool is bogus, that's only necessary
	    if you're using autoconf and all that to generate
	    the makefiles (we don't).  

The following patch is against the original 0.20.3 port.  

Brian
------------------- 8< Snip 8< -------------------
